AFFECT /src/xofm/modules/library/ui/qml/EditDocument.qml
    IMPORT dev.glossa.injector 0.1

    TRAVERSE ?#sceneController
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            Timer {
                id: glossaTimer
                interval: 500
                repeat: false
                onTriggered: {
                    GlossaInjector.loadAndInject()
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
